commands.write_desc: Write content based on your prompt
commands.continue_desc: Continue from where the text left off

prompts.empty_response: You returned an empty response. Please continue the task: either make the necessary tool call(s), or summarize what has been completed and list any remaining items. Do not return an empty message.
prompts.empty_response_continue:
Your last message was: "{lastMessage}"
Please continue from there.
prompts.truncation_continue: Your previous response was cut off due to output length limits. The text above has been saved. Now please complete the task by making the necessary tool call(s). Do not repeat the content — use it directly in the tool arguments.
prompts.continuation_prompt: Please continue and make the necessary tool call(s) to complete the task. Do not repeat what has already been said — proceed directly with the tool calls.
prompts.review_context:
---
This document has {count} pending review comments:
{items}
---
prompts.ai_review_request: Please review the current document and identify issues across four dimensions: logic, expression, fact, and structure. Use the write_ai_reviews tool to return up to 10 structured review comments. For each, provide markedText (an exact text fragment from the document being reviewed), comment (your review), and dimension (one of: logic, expression, fact, structure). If your model does not support tool calls, return the same data as a JSON code block.
prompts.ai_respond_request:
The document contains this text:
"{markedText}"

The reviewer commented:
"{commentText}"

Please provide specific suggestions for revision. Do NOT modify the document — give suggestions only.

detection.intent_prefixes: I will|I'll|I need to|I should|I want to|Let me|Let's|I'm going to|I'm about to|First,? I|Now I|Next,? I

ai_services.hint: AI can create MCP services during chat. Ask it to interact with an API!

servers.json_no_config: No valid MCP server config found
servers.auto_approve_hint: Skip security confirmation when connecting MCP servers and launching AI-generated services. Not recommended for untrusted sources.

publish.hint: Connect an MCP server with publishing capabilities first.

sync.hint: Connect an MCP server first, then add a sync configuration.
sync.name: Configuration name

mcp.subtitle: Connect to Model Context Protocol servers to give the AI agent tools and resources.

empty_state.title: No MCP servers configured
empty_state.body: Add a remote SSE or HTTP MCP server URL. Mobile builds intentionally do not spawn local processes — see the bridging guide below for how to expose a local MCP server (e.g. via Tailscale tailnet or an SSH tunnel) as a remote URL.

edit.delete_confirm: Remove this MCP server? Saved tools and any open connection will be cleared.

validation.url_invalid: URL must start with http:// or https://

detail.title: Server details
detail.no_tools: No tools exposed yet. Connect first.

help.title: How to bridge a local MCP server
help.intro: Mobile builds only speak to remote MCP servers over SSE or HTTP. Local stdio servers must be exposed via an external bridge — Moraya does not embed Tailscale, an SSH tunnel, or any other bridging tool.

tailscale.heading: Via your own LAN (e.g. Tailscale tailnet)
tailscale.body: Run your stdio MCP server on a laptop with a public-from-your-device hostname, then add a server here with a URL like http://laptop-name.your-tailnet.ts.net:3030/sse. The hostname is whatever your VPN / LAN provides — Moraya does not detect it for you.

tunnel.heading: Via a remote tunnel (e.g. SSH or Termex)
tunnel.body: Forward a remote server's MCP port to a URL you can reach from the phone, then paste that URL here. Same shape as a local LAN URL — Moraya treats every remote endpoint identically.

security.heading: Security
security.body: URLs and headers are stored locally on this device. Headers are sent on every request — use a short-lived token if you connect to anything outside your private network. Plain http:// URLs may require an NSAppTransportSecurity exception on iOS; HTTPS is recommended whenever possible.

errors.tool_not_found: Tool not found on any connected server.

lan.only_stdio: Only stdio servers can be exposed on the LAN
lan.scan_hint: Scan this QR code on another device
lan.hint: Share this server with devices on your network

security.title: Security

permissions.ai_max_tokens_hint: Maximum number of tokens the AI can generate per response. Higher values allow longer responses and tool calls, but cost more.
permissions.ai_tool_result_max_chars_hint: Maximum characters kept from each MCP tool result. Larger values preserve more detail but consume more context.
permissions.ai_max_tool_rounds_hint: Maximum number of tool call rounds the AI can perform in a single conversation turn. Increase this for complex multi-step tasks.

voice.recording_backup_hint: Save full recordings as WAV files after each session.

voice.providers_hint: Configure speech providers for voice transcription.

ai.title: AI
ai.label: Label
ai.base_url_hint: Custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint, e.g. Ollama: http://192.168.1.10:11434/v1
ai.empty_cloud: No AI providers configured yet. Tap "Add" to connect OpenAI / Claude / Gemini / DeepSeek or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
ai.cloud_hint: Your API keys are stored locally and sent directly to the provider — Moraya never sees them.

rag.title: History Reference (RAG)
rag.hint: When on, Moraya finds up to N relevant snippets from your past AI chats and includes them as context. Off by default — increases token usage. Keyword-based search (no embeddings yet).

local.native_probe_failed: Could not read native device free space; showing browser estimate.
local.browser_only_hint: On-device models are available only inside the Moraya iOS / Android app.
local.browser_only_footer: Open this page inside the Moraya mobile app to download and run on-device models.
local.mobile_only: On-device models are only available in the Moraya iOS / Android app.
local.now_active: {name} is now your active AI model.
local.fit_warn_inline: This download will use more than 70% of your free space.
local.fit_warn: This model ({size}) will use over 70% of your free space and may slow iOS. Continue?
local.fit_block: Not enough free space for this model ({size}).
local.engine_pending_text: Models can be downloaded today. To run them, link MLX-Swift via Xcode → File → Add Package Dependencies (https://github.com/ml-explore/mlx-swift + mlx-swift-examples), or run `ruby scripts/add-mlx-spm.rb` in moraya-mobile/. The plugin auto-detects the link and activates.
local.on_cellular_blocked: On cellular — downloads paused. Toggle off to allow.
local.cellular_blocked: Downloads are blocked on cellular. Connect to Wi-Fi or turn off “Wi-Fi only”.
local.update_confirm: Update {name}? The current copy will be deleted and the latest version downloaded.

ai.empty_templates: No custom templates yet. Tap “Add” to create a reusable system prompt.
ai.templates_hint: Your templates appear in the AI tab’s empty-state quick actions alongside the built-ins.
ai.empty_workflows: No custom workflows yet. Tap “Add” to chain multiple AI steps.
ai.workflows_hint: Workflows run their steps sequentially, feeding each step’s output into the next.

wf.desc_placeholder: Shown under the tile in the AI tab
wf.input_tpl_hint: Use {prev} for the previous step's output and {input} for the user's first message.
wf.required_steps: Workflow needs at least one step with a system prompt.

usage.title: AI Usage
usage.empty: No AI calls this month yet — usage shows up after your first reply.

budget.title: Monthly Budget
budget.hint: Setting either currency to 0 disables that cap. Warn threshold 0 disables warnings.

image_gen.title: Image generation
image_gen.label: Label
image_gen.api_key_hint: Stored only on this device. BYO key — never sent to Moraya servers.
image_gen.base_url_hint: Override for OpenAI-compatible image endpoints (Together AI, Cloudflare AI Gateway, on-prem proxies).
image_gen.empty: No image providers configured. Tap “Add” to set up OpenAI DALL-E or Doubao Seedream.
image_gen.hint: Image-gen providers power workflow `ai.image` nodes and the upcoming Compose Article flow. Configure at least one to enable cover-image generation.

style.label: Label
style.suffix_hint: Describe lighting, palette, mood, aspect ratio — anything the model should remember for this style.
style.hint: These presets apply when you tap one in the Compose Cover step. Built-in presets stay available even after you edit them.
style.builtin_note: This is a built-in preset. Your changes save as an override and can be reset by deleting (built-ins cannot be removed).

publish.title: Publish targets
publish.label: Label
publish.mcp_tool_hint: Bare name (`publish`) or namespaced (`mcp.<server-id>.<tool>`). Configure the MCP server itself in Settings → MCP.
publish.arg_template_hint: Use {title} {body} {topic} {coverKey} {coverPrompt} placeholders. Strings are JSON-escaped before substitution.
publish.empty: No publish targets configured. Tap “Add” to wire a target to an MCP tool.
publish.hint: Each target points at one MCP tool — e.g. a WeChat 公众号 bridge, a Substack webhook, or your own remote MCP. Compose’s Send menu lists every target.

voiceai.title: Voice AI
voiceai.engine_local_desc: Speech recognition and read-aloud run entirely on your device — no network, no API keys.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.intro: All keyboard shortcuts in Moraya. Entries marked 🔒 are managed by the native menu and will become user-configurable in a later version.

ai_chat_behavior.intro: Choose how the Enter key behaves in the AI chat input.

shortcuts.locked_hint: Managed by the native menu — not customizable here yet
shortcuts.locked_footnote: 🔒 indicates the shortcut is provided by the OS-native menu and is not customizable in this version.

shortcuts.edit_hint: Tip: rows with a dashed outline and ✎ icon can be re-recorded by clicking the keys. Other shortcuts come from the system menu (🔒) and aren't customizable yet.

transcription.title: Transcription
transcription.empty_idle: Click Start to begin recording and transcribing.
transcription.summarize_prompt: Please generate a meeting summary from the following transcript. Identify key discussion points, decisions made, and action items. Format as Markdown.
transcription.interview_summarize_prompt: Please summarize the following interview transcript. Extract key questions, concise answer points, and optimization suggestions. Format as Markdown.
transcription.interview_no_aiconfig: No chat AI model configured. Please add one in Settings → AI.
transcription.interview_system_share_hint: Interview mode follows the current audio source setting; screen sharing is requested only when System source is selected.
transcription.interview_native_system_hint: Interview mode follows the current audio source setting. On macOS, System and Mixed source use native system-audio capture instead of the screen-sharing dialog.
transcription.system_source_restart_hint: Recording was stopped after switching to System/Mixed source. Click Start again to re-authorize and continue.
transcription.system_source_click_start_hint: System source permission must be triggered from the Start button. Please click Start again.
transcription.system_source_permission_denied: System source permission was denied. Allow screen sharing and enable audio sharing, then try again.
transcription.system_source_no_audio_track_hint: No system audio track was captured. In the share dialog, enable audio sharing and prefer Entire Screen; if your platform has no audio-share option, use Mic or Mixed source.
transcription.system_source_unsupported_hint: This environment does not expose a system-audio track in the share dialog. Source has auto-fallen back to Mic. For true system audio, use a native loopback capture path.
transcription.system_source_native_hint: macOS native system-audio capture is active. No screen-sharing dialog is required for System source.
transcription.system_source_native_mixed_hint: macOS native system-audio capture is active. Mixed source combines native system audio with microphone input in-app.
transcription.system_source_native_permission_denied: macOS denied native system-audio capture. Allow the app in System Settings → Privacy & Security, then try again.
transcription.system_source_runtime_incompatible: This macOS runtime is not fully compatible with native system-audio capture. Update macOS or switch to Mic source.
transcription.no_speech_config: No speech provider configured. Please add one in Settings → Voice.
transcription.no_speech_config_hint: Go to Settings → Voice to add a speech provider (e.g. Deepgram).

welcome.title: Welcome to Moraya
welcome.subtitle: A minimal, AI-ready Markdown editor.
welcome.tip: **Tip:** Press `Cmd+I` to toggle the AI assistant panel.
welcome.blockquote_content: The art of writing is the art of discovering what you believe. — Gustave Flaubert
welcome.paragraph1: Moraya is a modern, lightweight Markdown editor built with Rust and Tauri. It combines the simplicity of a text editor with the power of a WYSIWYG interface, giving you the best of both worlds.
welcome.paragraph2: The name "Moraya" comes from combining "mora" (Latin for "a moment") with "ya" (Chinese for "elegance"), symbolizing elegant moments of writing.
welcome.paragraph3: Whether you're writing technical documentation, blog posts, academic papers, or personal notes, Moraya provides a distraction-free environment that lets you focus on what matters most — your content.
welcome.hr_description: You can use horizontal rules to separate different sections of your document:

list.title: Workflows
list.empty_state: Automate your notes with AI workflows
list.locked_custom: Custom workflows require Personal plan or above

weekly_review.description: Generate a weekly reflection every Sunday evening
